name: Frozen visual encoder
role: Map raw frames to shared embeddings
information_boundary: Fit outside test users; identical weights and transforms across paired methods

name: Support prototype memory
role: Bind held-out user's object labels from clean support videos
replaceable_by: nearest neighbour; linear head; Naive Bayes

name: Input routing/gain motif
role: Suppress unreliable embedding coordinates or frames
information_boundary: No quality annotations at query time

name: Gated delta association motif
role: Write and retrieve object-label associations with bounded state
information_boundary: No query labels; support writes audited

name: Temporal dynamics motif
role: Maintain causal evidence through transient degradation
input_format: current class evidence and previous state
information_boundary: Current and earlier frames from the same query video only

name: Low-dimensional reward controller
role: Choose or mix motifs from causal diagnostics
input_format: diagnostics action and executed training reward
replaceable_by: fixed best; supervised selector; random; oracle
information_boundary: No true demand or unexecuted rewards; frozen for official test query

name: Task head
role: Decode class from the common state
information_boundary: Class map formed from support only

name: High-rank E/I carrier
role: Execute selected currents in one participating recurrent state
information_boundary: Secondary claim; output must not bypass carrier
